name_en: 【Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Owner Sale Chip Version】This M25008 Shopper handbag features raffia woven with Damier pattern, requiring dozens of hours to complete. Leather base and a detachable inner bag complete the functional details, while the raffia Louis Vuitton logo adds brand elements.
